journal.name: Arizona Journal of International and Comparative Law

registry_refs.key: Arizona Journal of International and Comparative Law
registry_refs.notes: Registry has active WordPress and DSpace-oriented rows.
Existing curated sitemap identifies the University of Arizona repository as the authoritative article archive.

publication_scope.platform: dspace angular behind wordpress journal site
publication_scope.notes: The supplied WordPress archive could not be trusted over TLS; legacy handle 10150/679294 redirects to this repository collection.

evidence.notes: TLS verification failed because the site presented a self-signed certificate; the www variant failed identically. No insecure bypass was used and no journal HTML was requested.

Crawl-delay 10; collection/item pages are allowed without query/full suffixes, but search, browse, OAI, and nearly all /server/api routes are disallowed. Only core mapping and bitstreams API routes are allowed.
Legacy handle redirects to /collections/f485d6a1-e579-48f0-90c5-7eac2da40ee2 and returns only an Angular DSpace ds-app shell with JavaScript bundles; no issue or article records are server-rendered.

reconnaissance.notes: Preflight stopped after the TLS barrier and one robots-permitted repository-shell check. Existing static DSpace selectors are stale against the current Angular frontend and were not treated as live evidence.

include: Items belonging to the identified AJICL repository collection
Article bitstreams mapped to those items
exclude: DSpace search, browse, OAI, disallowed core API routes
journal site content until trusted TLS is restored
scope.notes: Collection membership must be established without broad or robots-disallowed endpoints.

entry_points.notes: Canonical collection route, but current response is a JavaScript shell.

nodes.notes: WordPress archive, inaccessible under trusted TLS.
Expected DSpace item; live route not discovered within policy.
Expected core bitstream; no representative URL retrieved.

edges.notes: Legacy handle redirect confirms the collection UUID.

edges.locator: Requires browser-rendered DSpace collection results or an explicitly permitted mapping workflow
edges.notes: Do not use disallowed search/browse/core API enumeration.

archive_patterns.notes: Current DSpace collection route. No AJICL item UUID was discovered in the bounded pass.

pagination.termination: Unknown because records were not server-rendered and query/API discovery is restricted by robots.
pagination.notes: Treat as unknown dynamic pagination until an authorized browser renders the collection.

layout_eras.label: Current Angular DSpace shell
layout_eras.notes: Static li.ds-artifact-item selectors in the old sitemap do not appear in the current server response.

title.notes: Older sitemap proposed .list-title-clamper; it is unverified on current frontend.

validation.notes: No file URL was discovered or fetched.

robots.notes: Crawl-delay 10 and extensive DSpace route restrictions.

barriers.notes: Self-signed certificate blocks trusted access to the journal host.
Repository collection is an Angular shell without rendered records.
The obvious search/browse/core API discovery routes are disallowed.

access.politeness_notes: No TLS bypass. Repository robots was checked before the single collection request, and its ten-second delay was respected.

verdict.summary: The supplied journal host cannot be trusted due to a self-signed certificate; its authoritative DSpace collection is reachable but returns only an Angular shell while likely discovery APIs are robots-restricted.
blockers: Journal robots and archive are inaccessible under trusted TLS.
DSpace collection records require JavaScript rendering.
Search, browse, OAI, and most core API routes are disallowed.
verdict.next_action: Repair or verify the journal certificate, then use an authorized browser to render the permitted collection route while honoring Crawl-delay 10; do not use disallowed repository APIs.
verdict.implementation_notes: Do not promote legacy li.ds-artifact-item selectors until current rendered DOM is observed.
